// note: OpenControl is a single self-contained Rust executable. Build with `cargo build --release`, then point your MCP host at the produced binary.
// privacy: Optional. Block apps from the AI: matching windows are redacted from every screenshot/OCR result and refused for control. Values are ';'- or ','-separated. This is a user control; the agent cannot change it.
// blocklist file: For finer control (per-rule blur, exact window class, custom fill color) place this JSON at %APPDATA%\OpenControl\blocklist.json, or point OPENCONTROL_BLOCKLIST at any path. Matching is case-insensitive; fields within a rule are AND-ed, rules are OR-ed; 'title' is a substring match or a '*' glob.
